APPROVE
AgentRunner interface migrated to (ctx, ResolvedConfig, AgentRunRuntime) signature. Store builds ResolvedConfig from Executor.Env (HARNESS/MODEL/EFFORT) + TimeoutMS via LoadAndResolve. Wrapper delegates to RunWithConfigViaService. CommandFactory split into Agent/ExecAgentRunnerOverride. Result.json reports build+tests passing.
